name: JoAi: Studio Produce

description.en: Trigger your agent to produce content for a studio project — generate text, images, or other creative output based on instructions.
description.de: Lasse deinen Agenten Inhalte für ein Studio-Projekt produzieren — erstelle Text, Bilder oder andere kreative Ausgaben basierend auf Anweisungen.
description.es: Trigger your agent to produce content for a studio project — generate text, images, or other creative output based on instructions.
description.fr: Trigger your agent to produce content for a studio project — generate text, images, or other creative output based on instructions.
description.ro: Trigger your agent to produce content for a studio project — generate text, images, or other creative output based on instructions.
description.it: Trigger your agent to produce content for a studio project — generate text, images, or other creative output based on instructions.

bot: Use this when the user wants to generate or produce content for a specific studio project. Ask for the project ID and what to produce.

inputs.name: Project ID

description.en: The ID of the studio project
description.es: The ID of the studio project
description.fr: The ID of the studio project
description.ro: The ID of the studio project
description.it: The ID of the studio project

inputs.bot: The project hash ID. If the user refers to a project by name, list projects first to find the matching ID.
